generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors providing speed, position, and other vehicle parameters"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw LiDAR point cloud data after transmission but before processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5_0
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and motion parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo NVIDIAJetpack5_0
]

instance StoredVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state data stored in SQL database for reporting"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance StoredLiDARData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data stored in SQL database for analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
]

instance DBSCANModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN algorithm for clustering raw LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance KalmanFilterModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman filter for tracking objects from clustered LiDAR data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ACC model computes vehicle speed based on sensor inputs"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack5_0 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetpack 5.0 SDK for hardware acceleration"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Robot Operating System 2 (ROS2) middleware for inter-component communication and ISO 23247 data translation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance Python3_8 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python 3.8 for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "C++ for application development"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for simulation and modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCModel, DBSCANModel, KalmanFilterModel
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for structured data storage and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, DataReportInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Computation Offloading of ACC system operations from vehicle's onboard hardware to Digital Twin for lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, and actuation command transmission"
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedCalculationInsight, LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, ActuationCommandAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote Management interfaces for enabling/disabling ACC, modifying speed parameters, and initiating emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableAction, SpeedParameterModificationAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time 3D visualization of vehicle state, projected driving path, and detected object tracks"
]

instance DataReportInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Data saving and report generation for system performance tracking"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of desired speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using object tracking data"
]

instance ActuationCommandAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Transmission of actuation commands for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enable or disable Adaptive Cruise Control via remote UI"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SpeedParameterModificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Modify desired speed parameters remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Initiate emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin entity deployed as ROS2 package for hardware control"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin entity deployed as ROS2 package for data processing and modeling"
]

instance UserInterfaceEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface entity deployed as ROS2 package"
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface subcomponent for 3D visualization of vehicle data"
]

instance ControlPanelFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface subcomponent for control commands (ACC enable/disable, speed settings, emergency braking)"
]

instance DataPreProcessingFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking processing of raw LiDAR data"
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Functional Entity for serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversion per ISO 23247 standard"
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment hosting Digital Twin components and services"
    base:contains DigitalTwinEntity, ThreeDVisualizationFE, ControlPanelFE, DataPreProcessingFE, ISO23247DataTranslationFE
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., desired speed, emergency braking) generated by ACC Controlling FE are serialized and converted via Data Translation FE, then transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to Actuation FE. The Actuation FE converts these commands into motor voltage and steering servo signals for physical actuation, with feedback loops confirming execution through sensor data."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system requires 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to enable computation offloading, as mandated by safety-critical vehicular standards, though hardware limitations necessitate this specific threshold."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, organizing software components into entity-based structures (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entities). Each entity is deployed on dedicated hardware, with the Physical Twin Entity deviating from ISO 23247 by hosting general automotive functionality (e.g., Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking) instead of resource-specific OME functionality, impacting ownership and engineering processes."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, and inter-entity communication is conducted over Wi-Fi using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Computation is off-loaded to cloud resources for critical or non-critical tasks as specified in Section III.A. Ego vehicle state data is stored on an external device per Requirement R3. No details on computational requirements, scalability mechanisms beyond off-loading, deployment models, or availability/reliability assurances are provided in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247:2021 standard for Digital Twin framework in manufacturing, structured into four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. The Reference architecture (Part 2) defines an entity-based structure comprising Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities may utilize OPC Unified Architecture for interoperability, though the standard does not specify implementation details for FEs."
]
